chunks.title: Centralization of Worship
chunks.reason: Establishes the command to destroy local shrines and worship only at the chosen place.

chunks.title: Regulations on Meat and Tithes
chunks.reason: Distinguishes between eating meat locally versus bringing tithes to the central sanctuary.

chunks.title: Warning Against Idolatry
chunks.reason: Admonishes the people to avoid adopting the religious practices of the conquered nations.

chunks.title: Final Charge
chunks.reason: Concludes the chapter with a summary command to observe the statutes precisely.
